title: Command Hotkeys
description: Allows you to bind hotkeys to a command. Use /hotcmds or the keybind(default k) to open the configuration menu
body: Allows you to type a command and bind a key to said command. All entries are saved and viewable in the list menu displaying the command, the key, and the option to remove. The intention is to create a shortcut of any key to instantly send any command the user wants while saving the configurations. The menu can be accessed by typing /hotcmds or using the keybind which is deafult to k but can be changed via the vanilla menu.
